title: Anime Run
description: Sprint like anime characters such as Naruto
body:
Sprint like your favorite Anime Characters such as the popular Naruto. This Naruto run poses the character with their arms straight back and the body leaned forwards. 

This sprint applies to both the local player and other players around sprinting.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hYes0C8uCpw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
